title: Nico's PvP Optimized
description: This project has many optimisation mods, especially around PVP and in general.
body:
****PURPOSE****

I made this modpack to share my PvP mods across devices, but I realised it would be good for others to use a prebuilt modpack, as I know many people don't know how to optimise Minecraft properly and efficiently. 

It includes many QOL mods and features, tons of Optimisation mods, and many PVP mods that pros recommend using.

I haven't applied a license, so feel free to use this modpack as you like. All mods are from Modrinth or Curseforge. I would prefer that no one take credit for my modpack, as this is a side-hobby.

****NOTE****

e4mc does not work offline, so single-player worlds will not load while e4mc is enabled
